verification_evidence.codex_run_help: python pipeline.py review codex-run --help: exit 0, shows plan|scope|code|hygiene|pr|rca
verification_evidence.setup_required: _openai_api_key mock returns None -> SystemExit(1) + SETUP_REQUIRED confirmed
verification_evidence.api_key_not_in_output: raw/result files contain no sk-secret-test-key-abc123 confirmed
verification_evidence.fallback_model: CODEX_REQUIRED_MODEL fixed to GPT-5.5, no fallback path exists

acceptance_criteria_check.criterion: API key absent: SETUP_REQUIRED + exit 1 confirmed by tc03 tests
API key not in raw/result files (tc06 PASS)
